user_query: I am planning to visit the office with CNPJ number 37335118000180. Can you provide me with the street view image, map of the surroundings, and the PDF certificate from the Receita Federal? Also, include the complete information about Simples Nacional and the details from the Receita Federal.

TaskList.description: Retrieve the street view image for the location associated with the CNPJ number 37335118000180.
Get the map of the surroundings for the location associated with the CNPJ number 37335118000180.
Download the PDF certificate from the Receita Federal for the provided CNPJ number.
Query for complete information regarding Simples Nacional related to the provided CNPJ number.
Obtain detailed information from the Receita Federal for the CNPJ number 37335118000180.
